'''tangawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearmongering|fearmongering]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearmongering|fearmongering]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tangawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tængæwæth|tængæwæth]] || [[word:tængæwæj|tængæwæj]] || [[word:tængæwæsh|tængæwæsh]] || [[word:tængæwæ|tængæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tangangawath|tangangawath]] || [[word:tangangawaj|tangangawaj]] || [[word:tangangawash|tangangawash]] || [[word:tangangawa|tangangawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tangawath|tangawath]] || [[word:tangawaj|tangawaj]] || [[word:tangawash|tangawash]] || [[word:tangawa|tangawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tangafwafth|tangafwafth]] || [[word:tangafwafj|tangafwafj]] || [[word:tangafwafsh|tangafwafsh]] || [[word:tangafwaf|tangafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tangawatha|tangawatha]] || [[word:tangawaja|tangawaja]] || [[word:tangawasha|tangawasha]] || [[word:tangawaka|tangawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tangawath|tangawath]] || [[word:tangawaj|tangawaj]] || [[word:tangawash|tangawash]] || [[word:tangawa|tangawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tangawathal|tangawathal]] || [[word:tangawajal|tangawajal]] || [[word:tangawashal|tangawashal]] || [[word:tangawakal|tangawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tangawaathatha|tangawaathatha]] || [[word:tangawaajaja|tangawaajaja]] || [[word:tangawaashasha|tangawaashasha]] || [[word:tangawaaka|tangawaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tangawathan|tangawathan]] || [[word:tangawajan|tangawajan]] || [[word:tangawashan|tangawashan]] || [[word:tangawakan|tangawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tangawathaoro|tangawathaoro]] || [[word:tangawajaoro|tangawajaoro]] || [[word:tangawashaoro|tangawashaoro]] || [[word:tangawakaoro|tangawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b470777}}
